task_title: Checkpoint Gate: Bounded Extractability Audit (Verified Cycle)
task_objective: Run the bounded extractability audit as a real two-role PCC cycle to satisfy Maturity Checkpoint criterion 2 (docs/CCB_PCC_RELATIONSHIP.md §8), replacing the self-declared DECISION-083 with a properly worker-produced, independently Codex-verified audit. DECISION-083 recorded 'extractability audit passes / checkpoint reached' directly in the decision log without a bounded task or independent verification; this task supplies the missing verified proof. Working only from repo truth, audit whether the extractability rule (DECISION-074/077: every capability is a discrete unit with an explicit .cockpit/ file-bridge contract, no hidden shared state, no undocumented cross-script assumptions) actually holds across the scripts changed since DECISION-074 plus the direct bridge/support scripts they rely on. Produce the audit and its evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md, sorted strictly into real blockers / maintainability smells / optional polish. This task does NOT record checkpoint-reached and does NOT edit DECISION-083 or any doc/script/schema; recording checkpoint-reached is a separate step that happens only after Codex issues PASS.
completion_criteria: The audit covers exactly the scripts already identified for the checkpoint extractability check (per DECISION-083 and IDEA-014), and no broader: the changed-since-DECISION-074 set (scripts/classify-routing.ps1, scripts/generate-worker-directive.ps1, scripts/doctor.ps1, scripts/enforce-handoff-restart-safety.ps1, scripts/backup-protected-files.ps1) plus the direct support/bridge scripts they rely on (scripts/validate-cockpit-state.ps1, scripts/verify-dual-restart-safety.ps1, scripts/verify-worker-restart-safety.ps1, scripts/generate-advisor-restart-brief.ps1, scripts/refresh-live-handoff-artifacts.ps1, scripts/check-schemas.ps1).

For each audited script, the worker states from the actual file whether it communicates only through explicit .cockpit/ files and/or stdout/exit codes, whether it introduces any hidden shared runtime state, and whether it makes any undocumented cross-script assumption. Claims are grounded in the file contents, not asserted.

Findings are sorted into exactly three buckets: real blockers (would make the kernel unsound or untrustworthy to freeze), maintainability smells (non-blocking), and optional polish. If a bucket is empty, that is stated plainly.

The audit ends with an explicit yes/no judgment on whether the extractability rule holds in the real kernel, and whether the conclusion matches, overstates, or contradicts DECISION-083 -- reached from the evidence, not chosen to agree with DECISION-083.
No script, no doc (including docs/DECISIONS.md and DECISION-083), and no schema is edited by this task. Checkpoint-reached is NOT recorded by this task.
scripts/validate-cockpit-state.ps1, scripts/check-schemas.ps1, and scripts/doctor.ps1 pass/run cleanly after the task's normal state bookkeeping; any WARN is disclosed honestly in the worker result.
The task is handed back through the normal worker path for independent Codex verification; it is not self-closed and no verification verdict is written by the worker.

allowed: Read the audited scripts listed in the completion criteria, plus backlog/IDEAS.md (IDEA-014), docs/CCB_PCC_RELATIONSHIP.md §8, and DECISION-074/077/083 in docs/DECISIONS.md, strictly as read-only evidence.
Write the bounded extractability audit and its evidence to .cockpit/result/worker-result.md.
Regenerate the live handoff artifacts from canonical state using the existing repo scripts.
Run scripts/validate-cockpit-state.ps1, scripts/check-schemas.ps1, and scripts/doctor.ps1 and report their results honestly.
Finalize the handback through the normal repo path for independent Codex verification.
forbidden: Do not edit any script, any doc (including docs/DECISIONS.md and the DECISION-083 text), backlog/IDEAS.md, docs/CCB_PCC_RELATIONSHIP.md, docs/PROJECT_CHARTER.md, or any schema.
Do not record checkpoint-reached anywhere; that is a separate post-PASS step, not part of this task.
Do not broaden the audit into a rewrite pass, a refactor, or a review of scripts outside the identified set.

Do not change any script logic, product behavior, verdict definition, task status enum, Task Safety Class definition, Owner Review Matrix row, Stop-Instead-of-Guess trigger, or Acceptance Boundary Rule.
Do not add any new log event type or change routing-log.jsonl semantics.
Do not self-close the task, write a verification verdict, or manually invoke codex exec for this task's verification.

required_evidence: Summary of the audit and its yes/no extractability judgment.
Per-script findings grounded in file contents.
Findings sorted into real blockers / maintainability smells / optional polish.
Command/test results for validate-cockpit-state.ps1, check-schemas.ps1, and doctor.ps1.
Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched (no script/doc/schema edited, checkpoint-reached not recorded).
next_action: Worker evidence is in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md. Codex reviews evidence and issues a verification verdict per docs/VERIFICATION_RESULT_SPEC.md.
